title: verbascum repens
intro: Verbascum repens, also known as creeping mullein, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the figwort family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat skin conditions such as wounds, eczema, and acne. The health benefits of Verbascum repens include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Verbascum repens is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves that can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
